title: RAGAS: Automated Evaluation of Retrieval Augmented Generation
summary: Propose faithfulness and answer relevance metrics for RAG pipelines with human correlation study.

title: Citation-Aware Faithfulness for Grounded Generation
summary: Citation-level faithfulness scoring correlates with expert judgments better than n-gram overlap.

title: Dense Passage Retrieval for Open-Domain QA
summary: DPR dual-encoder retrieval for open-domain question answering.

title: ImageNet Classification with Deep CNNs
summary: Classic vision benchmark paper on deep convolutional networks.

title: A Survey on Hallucination in Large Language Models
summary: Taxonomy of hallucinations; briefly mentions RAG as mitigation without new faithfulness metrics.
